field.value: Fragment from the Res Gestae Inscription
Fragment from the Res Gestae Divi Augusti inscription at Monumentum Ancyranum.

REM.LOCVM.S[ENTENTIAE.DICENDAE.SIMVL.DANS.ET.IM]PERIVM.MIHI.DEDIT / RES.PVBLICA.N[E.QVID.DETRIMENTI.CAPERET.ME.]PRO.PRAETORE.SIMVL CVM. / CONSVLIBVS.PRO[VIDERE.IVSSIT POPVLVS.]AVTEM.EODEM.ANNO.ME / CONSVLEM.CVM[.CONSVL.VTERQVE.IN BELLO.CECI]DISSET.ET.TRIVMVIRVM.REI.PVBLI / CAE.CONSTITVEND[AE.CREAVIT] / QVI.PARENTEM.MEVM[.INTERFECERVNT.EO]S.IN EXILIVM.EXPVLI.IVDICIIS.LEGI / TIMIS.VLTVS.EORVM[.FA]CI[NVS.]ET POSTEA.BELLVM.INFERENTIS.REI.PVBLICAE / VICI.B[IS.A]CIE[.] / [B]ELLA.TERRA ET.MARI[.]C[IVILIA.EXTER]NAQVE.TOTO.IN ORBE.TERRARVM.S[AEPE.GESSI]
